flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tuskegee University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.6k → $25.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tuskegee University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.6k → $25.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tuskegee University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tuskegee University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2k → 2.6k).
